interactions.summary: Jiang closes by saying capitalism cannot be defeated because it is too powerful, asks for final questions, and previews the next class on the time revolution.

claims.claim: Jiang concludes that capitalism cannot be defeated because it is too powerful.
The next scheduled course topic after this lecture is the time revolution.

signature_moments.moment: The final line is blunt fatalism: defeating capitalism cannot be done.
signature_moments.source_phrase: Good luck trying to defeat capitalism. You can't do it. It can't be done.
signature_moments.why_it_matters: It leaves the lecture with capitalism as an almost inescapable power.

chronology_notes.note: This is the lecture close and course-sequence note for the next Tuesday topic.
